action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py truncation in recent iters leads to incomplete run_evaluation (falls to proxy-only, eval=0.0); best full-test remains 0.6057 (success=0.873, dist~338m, rooms~0.8 success). Proxy ~0.84 on 9 easy maps. Analysis: current global Dijkstra (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) + next-hop is strong 0-param frontier planner fully compatible with ExplorationEnv/node graph/contract (<=50M params). Root cause=long code + fragile fallback; new alpha=2.0/beta=2.0 emphasizes high-utility clusters more (should improve room success + reduce avg dist). Decision: provide FULL compact non-truncated predict.py (cleaned select_waypoint, robust config parse + glob fallback to 3 maps/type proxy, per-ep try/except, exact JSON with per_episode/per_type/success-only dist + correct exploration_score formula), update train.py with new params/v16. Run train+proxy validation then submit_eval for official 150-map test score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
